economic_notes: Band operates Alkali Enterprises store, Ecolink Forest Services Ltd. (forestry), and Alkali Resource Management Ltd. (resource management). Dog Creek Ranch Ltd. also held at cost. Biomass heating project acquired during year. COVID-19 impact noted with additional federal relief funding obtained.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Two business enterprises (Ecolink Forest Services Ltd. and Alkali Resource Management Ltd.) accounted for by modified equity method; Dog Creek Ranch Ltd. held at cost. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Total government transfers estimated as sum of all federal and provincial government funding lines (ISC Operating, ISC Capital, FNHA, CMHC, CCATEC, Dept of Justice, DFO, Natural Resources, FNESC, Province of BC, Wage subsidy, BC Hydro, New Relationship Trust = 12,856,557). OSR includes store sales, investment income, Enbridge, rental income, royalties, service agreement, daycare fees, administration, and all other sources. Amortization line in expenses schedule is separate from program expenses. Capital improvement projects expense of $1,081,068 included in administration/infrastructure but shown separately in Schedule 2.
